title: Consumer intelligence mobile experience
summary: Mobile applications powering consumer insights and analytics for CPG and retail clients.
description: Led architecture and delivery of cross-platform mobile solutions used by enterprise clients for consumer behavior and retail analytics. Worked across product, design, and backend to ship performant, data-rich experiences on phones and tablets. Delivered on time with high adoption; client reported improved engagement and faster decision-making. Technologies included Ionic, Angular, Cordova, and cloud-backed APIs.

title: Brand strategy and statistics systems
summary: Enterprise brand strategy and statistics systems across Android and hybrid apps.
description: Delivered brand strategy and statistics systems for multiple clients; implemented analytics, reporting, and data visualization features. Built with Ionic, Angular, Cordova, and Android (Java). Successfully scaled to several brands and reduced time-to-insight for stakeholders.

title: Retail mobile and Point of Sale
summary: Android and JavaFX retail apps with offline sync for stores and field teams.
description: Built Android mobile applications for Healthcare, M-Commerce, and Retail (PoS) using Android SDK and H2. Delivered Java Retail (Point of Sale) with JavaFX and Symmetric DB and online/offline auto-sync. Success story: stable rollout for multiple store locations with reliable sync and minimal training.

title: Cross-platform enterprise apps
summary: Android and BlackBerry enterprise and consumer apps with shared logic and platform-specific UI.
description: Developed mobile applications for Android (Java, jQuery Mobile, Sencha Touch, PhoneGap) and BlackBerry (WebWorks, HTML/CSS/jQuery Mobile). Delivered brand strategy and statistics features for clients. Successfully shipped cross-platform solutions with consistent UX and maintainable codebases.

title: Multi-platform mobile (Android, BlackBerry, J2ME, Symbian)
summary: Mobile apps across four platforms for consumer and enterprise use cases.
description: Developed applications for Android, BlackBerry, J2ME (CLDC/MIDP, LWUIT), and Symbian (Carbide C++). Delivered brand and statistics systems for multiple clients. Brought consistent data and UX patterns across platforms and helped establish reusable components.
